name: Baker's Bread in a Bag
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bag, combine yeast, 1-1/2 cups flour, sugar, and salt.
2. Add margarine and warm water.
3. Press most of the air out of the bag and seal it.
4. Squeeze and press the bag until the dough is well mixed.
5. Open the bag and add the remaining 1-1/2 cups of flour. Seal the bag again.
6. Continue pressing and squeezing until the flour is incorporated into the dough.
7. If needed, add up to 1/2 cup more flour if the dough is too sticky.
8. Unzip the bag and let it rest for 20 minutes at room temperature to rise.
9. Spray a bread pan with no-stick cooking spray.
10. Gently press the dough into the prepared pan.
11. Let the dough rise in a warm place until it has doubled in size, about 1 hour.
12. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
13. Bake the bread for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped.
14. Remove the bread from the pan to cool on a wire rack.
